title: 日経新春杯の後に・急襲！新ライバル

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I did it... I ran properly... Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Trainer, you know... I'm finally feeling
a little more confident!

She's true to her word. This is a huge leap in terms
of growth. Not to mention...
choice_data_list:
(Her running has certainly gotten better
too—that's for sure.)

text_block_list.text:
She stands her ground, even in a high-pace senior
graded race. If she keeps this up...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I can do it now?! Run with Opera O
in a senior G1?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You can't go running with Opera O just yet. There
still stands one opponent you must defeat!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heaven calls upon me, Buddha as my witness.
Spirits begone, vanquished by the spinach leaf!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You want to run with Opera O? Then do so after defeating me, Matikanefukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh, Fukukitaru? But I thought we were kindred
spirits...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why yes, we are. However... I assure you my
challenge comes with a profound and esoteric
meaning.

I get the feeling Matikanefukukitaru is planning
something, I can't be completely sure though.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Then, that settles it! This challenge will take place
nowhere other than...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen at the end of the year!
choice_data_list: Isn't that a little far away?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Then, how about the Kinko Sho?

A swift and easy response. With that, it's
decided—the friends will face off in the Kinko Sho
this March.
